Ciudad Maderas in Querétaro has several developments located in strategic areas of the state.
• El Marqués: Ciudad Maderas Querétaro and Ciudad Maderas Montaña, mainly focused on investment, close to industrial parks and the airport.
• Corregidora: Ciudad Maderas Corregidora and Ciudad Maderas Bosques, with better connectivity, services, and a stronger residential focus.
• North Zone / Expansion: Ciudad Maderas Norte, aimed at long-term investment with affordable prices and progressive development.
• South Zone: Ciudad Maderas Sur, composed of different residential clusters with shared amenities.
All developments offer residential lots with a clubhouse, direct financing, and a focus on medium- and long-term value appreciation.

Ciudad Maderas in Cancún has two developments located in strategic areas of the state, ideal for investment and asset growth.
• Ciudad Maderas Cancún: development focused on investment with high value appreciation potential, close to tourist and growth areas.
• Ciudad Maderas Riviera: development with a residential and vacation focus, with access to services and excellent connectivity.
Both developments offer residential lots with a clubhouse, amenities, direct financing, and a focus on medium- and long-term value appreciation.

Ciudad Maderas in León has four developments located in strategic areas of the state, ideal for both investment and residential use.
• Ciudad Maderas León: main development with an excellent location and consolidated growth.
• Ciudad Maderas León Norte: focused on medium- and long-term investment, with high value appreciation potential.
• Ciudad Maderas León Sur: development with a residential focus, with good connectivity and nearby services.
• Ciudad Maderas León Poniente: affordable option with great growth potential and progressive development.
All developments offer residential lots with a clubhouse, amenities, direct financing, and a focus on value appreciation, providing an excellent opportunity to invest or build in the future.

titulo: Land in Ciudad Maderas San Luis Potosí
descripcion_completa:
Ciudad Maderas in San Luis Potosí has two developments located in strategic areas of the state, ideal for investment and asset growth.
• Ciudad Maderas San Luis Potosí: main development with an excellent location and high value appreciation potential, close to industrial and growth areas.
• Ciudad Maderas Hacienda: development with a residential focus, with good connectivity and nearby services.
Both developments offer residential lots with a clubhouse, amenities, direct financing, and a focus on medium- and long-term value appreciation, providing an excellent opportunity to invest or build in the future.

titulo: Land in Ciudad Maderas San Miguel de Allende
descripcion_completa:
Ciudad Maderas in San Miguel de Allende is a development located in one of the most recognized and high-value growth areas worldwide, ideal for investment and asset growth.
• Hacienda Maderas San Miguel de Allende: residential development with an excellent location just 3.5 km from downtown, close to vineyards, services, and key points of the region.
• Project with over 20 amenities, 24/7 security, controlled access, and fully urbanized services.
The development offers residential lots with financing up to 240 months, monthly payments from $2,100 MXN, and the option to secure your lot from $5,000 MXN, providing an excellent opportunity to invest or build in the future.

titulo: Land in Ciudad Maderas Hacienda Península
descripcion_completa:
Ciudad Maderas in Mérida, Yucatán is a development located in one of the fastest-growing and safest regions in Mexico, ideal for investment and asset growth.
• Ciudad Maderas Hacienda Península: premium residential development with a strategic location near the beach and just minutes from Mérida, close to key attractions, services, and growth areas.
• Project with exclusive amenities, 24/7 security, controlled access, and fully urbanized infrastructure.
The development offers residential lots with direct financing up to 240 months, monthly payments from $2,352 MXN, and the option to secure your lot from $5,000 MXN, providing an excellent opportunity to invest or build in the future.

descripcion_corta: More than 40 years building in Mexico
descripcion_completa: With presence in Mexico and the United States, we have more than 34 active projects in key states such as Querétaro, Jalisco, Yucatán, and Nuevo León, among others. We have over 40 years developing residential and commercial communities with guaranteed value appreciation. Ciudad Maderas is recognized by experienced investors who seek real profitability, legal backing, and accessible financing.

precio: Land delivery in Ciudad Maderas Corregidora
descripcion_corta: More than 40 years building in Mexico
descripcion_completa: This is how the land delivery event at Ciudad Maderas Corregidora took place. Families gathered to tour the development, see their lots, discover the amenities, and enjoy this special day together. A moment full of smiles, connection, and great memories. Ciudad Maderas limited who can comment on this post.
